nodes.name: Pale-mandibled aracari
nodes.summary: Pale-mandibled aracari（Pale-mandibled aracari，学名 Pteroglossus erythropygius），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于原始森林、次生林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 原始森林
nodes.summary: 原始森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联240种鸟类，包括黑額鳴冠雉、Singing quail、Stripe-faced wood quail等240种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved November 10, 2022 It inhabits the interior and edges of evergreen primary forest and mature secondary forest and also coffee, cacao, and fruit plantations

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Downloaded from https://www.birds.cornell.edu/clementschecklist/download/ retrieved November 10, 2022 It inhabits the interior and edges of evergreen primary forest and mature secondary forest and also coffee, cacao, and fruit plantations

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. "[A]lthough it tolerates secondary forest, it nonetheless is very susceptible to deforestation"
